summary: Organization Document Vault feature fully tested (iteration_29). Backend: 25/25 tests PASS (100%). All vault CRUD endpoints working: upload document, list/filter/search documents, get document detail with audit trail, download file, update metadata, delete document. Role-based access working: owner and admin can upload/delete, all members can view/download. Audit trail tracking upload, view, download, update actions. Frontend: Vault tab in Organizations page working with stats bar, search, category filters, document list, upload modal, and document detail modal with audit trail.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: File upload with multipart form data working correctly
Good: Category filtering with MongoDB query working
Good: Search by name/description using regex working
Good: View count and download count incrementing correctly
Good: Audit trail entries created for upload, view, download, update actions
Good: Role-based access enforced (403 for non-admin upload/delete)
Good: All data-testid attributes present for testing
Good: Stats endpoint returns total_documents, total_size_bytes, categories breakdown
Good: Document deletion removes both DB record and file from disk

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and flows working

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed documents during testing, cleaned up afterward. Existing 'NDA Agreement v1' document remains in vault.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vault feature fully functional. Collections: vault_documents, vault_audit. Key routes: /api/vault/{org_id}/documents (CRUD), /api/vault/{org_id}/documents/{doc_id}/download, /api/vault/{org_id}/stats. File storage: /tmp/notary_vault/. Categories: contracts, agreements, notarized, identity, financial, legal, other. Frontend: OrgVault.jsx component rendered in OrganizationPage.jsx Vault tab.
